info.title: PH Regions API
info.description:
**💡About** A RESTful API that serves hierarchical location data of the Philippines — including regions, provinces, municipalities, and a randomly generated number of barangays per municipality for testing purposes. **⚠️ Important**

This API is intended for testing and simulating RESTful API requests from client applications. **Note:** The location data may be outdated and does not reflect the most current official records. **🧩 Alternate Docs**
  • Interactive API documentation (Swagger UI): [http://localhost:3001/api/docs](http://localhost:3001/api/docs)

tags.description: REST APIs for retrieving Philippine islands location data

tags.description: REST APIs for retrieving Philippine municipal location data

tags.name: Stats
tags.description: REST APIs for retrieving random test data for each **Municipality**

get.description: List of main island group names in the Philippines

schema.description: Flag to include the Mongo meta fields (eg., `createdAt`, `updatedAt`) in the response

parameters.description: Flag to include the Mongo meta fields (eg., `createdAt`, `updatedAt`) in the response
parameters.name: includeMeta

200.description: Object with Philippine main island group names

total.description: Total number of items in the `data[]` array

description.example: Main Island groups geographic location data of the Philippines

source.example: PAGASA Seasonal Rainfall Analysis Table (regions and provinces) and 10-Day Weather Forecast Excel file (provinces and municipalities)

dateCreated.description: Date the data set was originally fetched from source(s) in YYYY/MM/DD format
